📰 Agri-News & Market Trends

Market Watch
Tomato prices expected to rise 20% next month in Karnataka mandis.
Historical trends suggest peak demand during June-July.
Weather Insight
IMD predicts normal monsoon for South Interior Karnataka.
Prepare your seedbeds and drainage systems by mid-May.
Govt Policy
New 80% subsidy for Drip Irrigation sets under PMKSY.
Contact your local Raitha Samparka Kendra for application details.
💧

Smart Irrigation Advisor

AI-powered irrigation decisions based on real-time soil & weather data

📊 Enter Field Data

42%
💧

Enter field data and click Analyze & Recommend to get your personalized irrigation recommendation.

💡 Best Practices

🌅
Early Morning
Irrigate between 5–8 AM to reduce evaporation loss by up to 40%
📏
Drip Irrigation
Saves 30–50% water compared to flood irrigation
🌧️
Rainwater Harvest
Capture monsoon runoff to reduce dependency on groundwater
📊
Soil Sensors
IoT moisture sensors provide ±2% accuracy, reducing overwatering
🌿
